1.premise: A domestic-abuse joke can accidentally help the victim escape.
Making a domestic abuse joke implies public backlash, but reveals it helped the victim escape.

2.premise: Keeping a partner from leaving is so extreme she has to chew through physical chains.

lines.text: I recently learned...
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Uh...
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: So nice, sir!
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I don't think I just have to stand up here and make no jokes
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: and you guys would all be cracking up. I mean, this is great.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I honestly, I love this.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I recently learned there's some jokes you can't make
lines.label: setup

lines.text: in stand-up comedy.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Last week I did this joke about beating my girlfriend.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Yeah!
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: This guy knows what's going on.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: And now I can't fucking find her?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I'm not sure who went and told her,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but somebody gave her the courage to leave,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and now I can't.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I'm still trying to figure out
lines.label: setup

lines.text: how she chewed through the chains.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: That beaver-toothed bitch, fucking.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: She nibbled away to my heart.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I don't know what else to tell you.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Seriously though, if anybody sees her, tell her, come.
lines.label: punchline
